body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 59 — paragraph 4 c (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

4 c. When performing their tasks, the national supervisory authority shall act in compliance with the confidentiality obligations set out in Article 70.
parliament_text: 4 c. When performing their tasks, the national supervisory authority shall act in compliance with the confidentiality obligations set out in Article 70.
